headline: How The Investment Story For Shell (LSE:SHEL) Is Shifting As Analyst Views Split
summary: Shell’s updated fair value estimate has shifted from £34.65 to £37.17, giving you a fresh reference point for how analysts are framing the shares today. Behind that move, recent research has featured both higher and lower price targets, with some firms tying upgrades to revised commodity assumptions, while others trim targets or ratings on concerns that a lot of good news may already be reflected. Read on to see how these diverging calls fit together and how you can keep track as the...
